allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total items: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f'  {i[\\"category\\"][\\"name\\"]}: {i[\\"name\\"]} - \\${i[\\"price\\"]}'\) for i in d[:8]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total orders: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f'  {o[\\"orderNumber\\"]} | {o[\\"paymentMethod\\"]} | \\${o[\\"total\\"]}'\) for o in d[:6]]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/orders -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"items\\":[{\\"menuItemId\\":3,\\"name\\":\\"Cappuccino\\",\\"basePrice\\":4.5,\\"quantity\\":2,\\"variant\\":\\"Medium\\",\\"variantPrice\\":0,\\"addons\\":null,\\"addonsPrice\\":0,\\"itemTotal\\":9.0},{\\"menuItemId\\":19,\\"name\\":\\"Butter Croissant\\",\\"basePrice\\":3.5,\\"quantity\\":1,\\"variant\\":null,\\"variantPrice\\":0,\\"addons\\":null,\\"addonsPrice\\":0,\\"itemTotal\\":3.5},{\\"menuItemId\\":14,\\"name\\":\\"Iced Latte\\",\\"basePrice\\":5.0,\\"quantity\\":1,\\"variant\\":\\"Large\\",\\"variantPrice\\":0.75,\\"addons\\":[{\\"name\\":\\"Oat Milk\\",\\"price\\":0.60}],\\"addonsPrice\\":0.60,\\"itemTotal\\":6.35}],\\"subtotal\\":18.85,\\"taxRate\\":0.085,\\"taxAmount\\":1.47,\\"discountType\\":\\"PERCENT\\",\\"discountValue\\":10,\\"discountAmount\\":1.885,\\"total\\":18.435,\\"paymentMethod\\":\\"CARD\\",\\"note\\":\\"Demo order from sanity check\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); o=d[0]; print\(f'Latest order: {o[\\"orderNumber\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Status: {o[\\"status\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Payment: {o[\\"paymentMethod\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Items: {len\(o[\\"items\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'  Subtotal: \\${o[\\"subtotal\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Discount \(10%%\): -\\${o[\\"discountAmount\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Tax: \\${o[\\"taxAmount\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Total: \\${o[\\"total\\"]}'\); print\(f'  Note: {o[\\"note\\"]}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Today revenue: \\${d[\\"todayRevenue\\"]:.2f}'\); print\(f'Today orders: {d[\\"todayOrders\\"]}'\); print\(f'Items sold: {d[\\"totalItemsSold\\"]}'\); print\('Top items:'\); [print\(f'  {i[\\"name\\"]}: {i[\\"qty\\"]} sold'\) for i in d['topItems'][:4]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Cappuccino available: {d[\\"available\\"]}  \(toggled off\)'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Cappuccino available: {d[\\"available\\"]}  \(toggled back on\)'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/menu -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"name\\":\\"Oat Flat White\\",\\"description\\":\\"Flat white with house oat milk\\",\\"price\\":5.25,\\"categoryId\\":1,\\"available\\":true,\\"emoji\\":\\"☕\\",\\"variants\\":null,\\"addons\\":[{\\"name\\":\\"Extra Shot\\",\\"price\\":0.75}]}")
